channel.title: Tabbed Interface on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Tabbed Interface on Drupal WxT

item.title: Tabbed Interface (D7)
item.description: The easiest way to update an existing slideshow is to Edit the Block directly via contextual links. Simply mouse-over the gears widget in the top right corner and then click Edit Block. To see a list of carousel slideshows you can use the content blocks admin page /admin/content/blocks to filter by type Slideshow and then click Edit. Create / Edit slideshow Label: This is the visible name of the slideshow when listed in the blocks admin page.
